# Chess rule fixtures

`jchess-perft.epd` is the standard-chess dataset from
[`fathzer-games/jchess-perft-dataset`](https://github.com/fathzer-games/jchess-perft-dataset),
version 2.0.0. It contains 6,969 FEN positions and their known perft results.

The fixture is distributed under GPL-3.0; its upstream license is preserved in
`jchess-perft.LICENSE`. The application does not load or ship this test fixture
at runtime.
